lessons.title: Red, Blue and Pink
lessons.topic: Basic colors and sounds of P and Q

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color do you see on a ripe strawberry?
What color goes well with the night sky?
questions.hint: It's the color of a shadow.

questions.question_text: What is the beginning sound of the word 'quick'?

steps.title: The Colorful Garden
steps.text: Look at the garden! The pig is pink. The sky is blue. The queen has a red dress. I like blue.

questions.question: What is the color of the queen's dress?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what color you like.

steps.audio_text: The queen and the pig are in the garden. The queen smiles and says, 'What a lovely red flower you have, pig!'

questions.question: Who is in the garden with the pig?

questions.question_text: Fill in the blank: The ___ is red. (Vocabulary question)
Which word has the beginning sound /p/? (Phonics question)
Read: The pig is pink. What color is the pig?
Fill in the blank: The ___ is blue. (Grammar pattern question)
True or False: A queen is a person?

lessons.title: Green and Yellow
lessons.topic: Nature colors and the sound of R

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the grass in the park?
questions.hint: It is the color of leaves.

questions.question_text: Which fruit is yellow and has a peel?
Which animal makes a buzzing sound in the garden?
questions.hint: It is a small insect that collects nectar.

steps.title: Fun in the Green Park
steps.text: The grass is green. A rabbit runs fast. The sun is yellow. I like yellow flowers. Is it a rabbit?

steps.explanation: Use 'I like' to say what you enjoy.

steps.audio_text: The rabbit sees a green tree and a yellow butterfly. It runs happily around the garden.

questions.question_text: Which color do you see in the grass?
The rabbit can ___. (Fill in the blank)
Complete the sentence: I like __.
True or False: Rabbits are usually green.
What is the sound of R in rabbit?

lessons.title: Black and Orange
lessons.topic: Dark colors and sounds of S and T

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the sun?
questions.hint: It's the same color as a banana.

questions.question_text: Which animal is known for having a long neck?
questions.hint: It eats leaves from tall trees.

questions.question_text: What sound does a snake make?

items.example: Is it yellow like the sun?

steps.title: Colors Everywhere
steps.text: The sun is bright and yellow. I see a big orange tiger in the jungle. The tiger walks by and says hello. Look, there are ten oranges on the tree!

questions.question: How many oranges are on the tree?

steps.explanation: Use this to say what color something is.

steps.audio_text: The little black tiger is playing under the sun. Do you see the ten orange balls around it? Listen to the tiger growling softly.

questions.question: How many orange balls are there?

questions.question_text: What color is the night sky? (Vocabulary question)
Is it ___? Fill in the blank. (Grammar question)
True or False: The tiger is a big, orange cat with stripes. (Reading comprehension)
How many orange balls did you see in the story? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the sky on a sunny day?
questions.hint: This color is like the ocean.

questions.question_text: Which animal lives in the ocean and has many legs?
What color are apples when they are ripe?

steps.title: Colors in the Garden
steps.text: I am Mia. I like purple and green. The flower is purple. The leaf is green. Is it green? Yes, it is!

steps.audio_text: Look at the bright green tree. It's tall and green. Do you like green trees? I think they're wonderful!

questions.question: Does the speaker think trees are wonderful?

questions.question_text: The car __ red. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'apple'? (Vocabulary question)
Is 'The cat is black.' about an animal? (Reading comprehension question)
What color is the sky on a clear day? (Review question)
